## Definition of Done (engineering.md §7)

- [ ] Reuse check: no new pattern where a shared one exists; second occurrences extracted
- [ ] Domain constants imported from `lib/domain.ts` — nothing redefined
- [ ] Migration? behaviour tests extended + green locally · types regenerated · deployed via Management API · advisors clean
- [ ] Cross-links added for any new entity/reference
- [ ] `next build` + typecheck green
- [ ] **Learnings recorded in `docs/learnings.md`** — or state "no learnings" and why
- [ ] CLAUDE.md / engineering.md updated if conventions or behaviour changed
